_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: optic nerves from Nf1 f/1809 ; hGFAP-Cre mice were indistinguishable from Nf1 f/f controls (CTL) with respect to optic nerve volume
resourceName: Nf1 c.5425 C > T ; Arg1809Cys-mutant mice
details: Optic nerves from Nf1 f/1809 ; hGFAP-Cre mice had similar optic nerve volume (0.05 mm³), proliferative index (0.8% Ki67+ cells), microglia content (6.4% Iba1+ cells), and T-cell content (1.2 CD3+ cells) compared to controls
